title: Demon Mace
description: This texture pack turns the mace into a demon like weapon
body:
This texture pack adds a new texture to the mace, giving it a dark, demonic appearance. It also includes a subtle animation that brings the weapon to life, making it look more menacing in your hands.

Ideal for players who love MacePvP and want their weapon to stand out in combat.

If you have any questions, feedback, or personal inquiries of any kind, feel free to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/kX5NjxndyY) server. There, you can use the ticket system to contact me directly.
